content.en:
Jiong's eyes stared at Ye Tian with deep eyes, and said in a deep voice: "What do you mean?"

Ye Tian didn't panic at all, anyway, he was just an incarnation now, so he was naturally not afraid of anything.

So, Ye Tian said calmly: "Jiong, the Red Dragon Pool is indeed a treasure land, but the Red Dragon Pool contains a special energy that can affect the souls of the True Monarchs, and even transform and manipulate the souls, so as to transform the creatures that enter it into a special kind of human puppet, which will always be controlled by themselves." You let the True Monarchs enter the Red Dragon Pool, I'm afraid you have the idea of manipulating them!"

"I don't know what you're talking about!"

Jiong's face changed slightly, as if he didn't know anything.

But at this time, Ye Tian suddenly said: "Do you want me to tell the secret of the Red Dragon Pool, do you think other people believe it?"

"Who the hell are you, how do you know the secret of the Red Dragon Pool?"

Jiong finally changed color and asked.

According to his understanding, after the domain boundary was shattered, he fell into this unfamiliar territory, which was definitely not the chaotic region before, coupled with the information he collected from the outside world, the forces here did not know much about the domain realm.

Moreover, the Red Dragon Dojo was really an insignificant force in the domain realm, and the secret of the Red Dragon Pool was not known to other forces at all, except for the Middle Triple Heaven Force and the Upper Triple Heaven Force.

The battlefield ruins do not have the sect ruins of the Middle Triple Heaven Force and the Upper Triple Heaven Force at all, but there are some branch ruins, and it is unlikely that there is just enough information about the Red Dragon Dojo.

What's more, even if there is information about the Red Dragon Dojo, it is not something that ordinary people can obtain.

He was very curious about where Ye Tian learned about the secret of the Red Dragon Pool.

"Officially introduce my identity - Black Wind Mountain Preparatory Peak Master - Ye Tian!"

Ye Tian introduced himself.

"What, Black Wind Mountain Preparatory Peak Master!"

Jiong's expression changed drastically, and he couldn't believe it.

The Black Wind Mountain Reserve Peak Lord doesn't seem to be strong, but his potential is too high and too high, even higher than the potential of most Black Wind Mountain Peak Masters, and his future achievements are at least the top True Ancestor, and he is a True Ancestor who can fight with ordinary Dao Ancestors.

At the peak of the domain realm, there were few reserve peak masters in Black Wind Mountain, and even a long time before a reserve peak master was born, after all, the requirements of Black Wind Mountain and the reserve peak master were too high, and a true genius would not choose Black Wind Mountain at all, but would choose the Triple Heaven Force to join.

Of course, the strength of Black Wind Mountain is definitely not weak.

Although Jiong is not a real living being, just the spirit of the Red Dragon Dojo, he also has a certain understanding of the Black Wind Mountain, the strength of the Red Dragon Dojo is far inferior to the Black Wind Mountain, and even the Middle Triple Heaven Force behind the Red Dragon Dojo is far from being the opponent of the Black Wind Mountain.

Black Wind Mountain is a bandit force, and its reputation is not very good in the domain realm, and it is not listed as a division of forces, some people say that Black Wind Mountain is comparable to the Sixth Heaven Force of the Middle Triple Heaven Force.

Some people also say that Black Wind Mountain is comparable to the Sevenfold Heaven Force, that is, the Upper Triple Heaven Force.

As for the true strength of Black Wind Mountain, no one knows.

Jiong had heard of one thing, that is, there was a Sixfold Heaven Force, a sect that was about to be promoted to the Sevenfold Heavens Force, and killed a Dao Ancestor and several True Ancestors of Black Wind Mountain.

Soon after, this sect was trampled by a group of mysterious powerhouses.

It is precisely because of this incident that Black Wind Mountain has become extremely mysterious.

If the domain realm is still there, if he hears that the Black Wind Mountain is preparing for the peak master, I am afraid that he will be extremely jealous.

But now, the Black Wind Mountain has long been destroyed, even if Ye Tian becomes the reserve peak master of the Black Wind Mountain, and there is no big backer, he is naturally not very afraid.

But Ye Tian's talent is very high, and his future achievements are naturally very high, if he can not be offended, he naturally does not want to offend.

"It's a pity, if this Ye Tian doesn't know the secret of the Red Dragon Pool, he will have the opportunity to control him, then the Red Dragon Dojo will have one more genius with unlimited potential!"

Jiong sighed secretly.

"What do you want to do?" asked Jiong.

He felt that Ye Tian must have wanted to negotiate conditions, otherwise he would not have informed him, but directly leaked the secret of the Red Dragon Pool.

"I want the Ten Dao Techniques Inheritance of the Dao Law Pavilion!"

Ye Tian put forward his own request.

"Impossible!"

Jiong immediately refused.

Dao art inheritance, how is that possible!

The value of a Dao Technique Inheritance is so high, and it takes a lot of rare materials to create a Dao Technique Inheritance, and there are not many Dao Inheritance in the Red Dragon Dojo, and it cannot be replenished at present.

If you want to create a Dao Inheritance, you must be a Dao Ancestor who has cultivated a Dao Technique to the consummation realm before you can create a Dao Inheritance.

But where is there a Dao Ancestor in the Red Dragon Dojo at the moment, let alone cultivating a Dao technique to the consummation realm.

Therefore, the inheritance of the Dao art of the Red Dragon Dojo is one less than one consumption!

Ye Tian is now going to take away the ten Dao Technique inheritances in one go, which will almost make the Dao Law Pavilion abolish!

Without a Dao inheritance, how could he attract geniuses to the dojo, and how could he attract them to the Red Dragon Pool?

Moreover, he was instructed by the Red Dragon Dao Ancestor to strictly manage the Red Dragon Dojo, and he must not give all the ten Dao Techniques inheritance to others, otherwise it would be tantamount to living up to the trust of the Red Dragon Dao Ancestor.

"Dao Inheritance uses one less than one, it is impossible to give it all to you!"

Jiong solemnly expressed his attitude.

"Then the Eight Dao Sect Inheritance!"

Ye Tian lowered his requirements.

"Liumen, this is the least!" Ye Tian gritted his teeth and said.

"Don't be delusional!" said Jiong coldly.

One person and one spirit bargained, and finally Jiong agreed to pay the price of the inheritance of the two Dao Techniques to keep Ye Tian secret.

The inheritance of the two Dao techniques is also Jiong's bottom line, if there are more, Jiong will not care about this secret, and it is a big deal that he will not control these true monarchs.

Ye Tian didn't dare to ask too much, otherwise he wouldn't be able to get anything.

As for those true monarchs, what does it have to do with him?

Although some True Monarchs also came in from the Void Heaven Palace, it was a big deal that he reminded him a little, but if they didn't listen, they wouldn't blame him.

After reaching an agreement, Ye Tian made an oath.

Jiong then said, "You wait!"

Jiong was in a very bad mood, but he still went to get the inheritance of two Taoist techniques.

These two Dao Sect Inheritances are the inheritances selected by Ye Tian, he has already read the general information of the top ten Dao Sect Inheritances, although they are not good Dao Techniques, but at least they are also Dao Techniques!

Soon, Jiong came back, holding two balls of light in his hands, which were the inheritance balls of the Dao Inheritance.

"Here you go!"

Jiong threw over the inheritance ball, and said.

Ye Tian caught the inheritance ball, then probed it with his divine sense, and after confirming that it was correct, he left with a smile.

Outside the dojo.

Ye Tian looked at the two Dao Technique Inheritance Balls in his hand, and couldn't help but smile and said: "Dao Technique - Gold Chopping, Dao Technique - Three Turns Golden Body, these two Dao Techniques are of great value, although I can't cultivate now, but when I step into the ranks of True Ancestors, I have the hope of practicing them, once I practice the two Dao Techniques, my strength will inevitably increase greatly! Moreover, once I become the true peak master of Black Wind Mountain, I am afraid that I will also be able to obtain Dao Technique Inheritance!"

Just when Ye Tian had just put away the inheritance ball and was about to leave here, a change occurred!
